title: Amtech S6270 120 Piece assorted roll pin set
features: POPULAR SIZES: This set of roll pins contains a comprehensive assortment of the most popular sizes
RUST-RESISTANT: They have an anti-rust black oxide coating for durability
STORAGE CASE: Supplied in a handy plastic storage organiser box
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: From the manufacturer Amtech S6270 Assorted Roll Pin A comprehensive assortment of the most popular sizes Plastic storage case About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
